trivia_bullets.text: Rubblebelt Braggart is a red 5/5 Creature with type Lizard Warrior. The Rubblebelt is Ravnica's discontinuous wasteland territory held by the Gruul Clans — overgrown ruins on the fringes of the Tenth District's ordered guild zones. Lizard Warriors (distinct from Viashino, which were retooled in Modern Horizons 3) are an established Gruul-adjacent creature type, with Rubblebelt Runner from Ravnica Allegiance as an earlier example [Scryfall, WebSearch: mtg.wiki/page/Gruul_Clans].

The Suspect keyword is MKM's murder-mystery mechanic: a suspected creature gains menace and cannot block. Rubblebelt Braggart self-suspects on attack (if not already suspected), voluntarily trading its blocking ability for menace — a strong trade for a 5/5 that does not need to block [Scryfall oracle text, magic.wizards.com/en/news/feature/murders-at-karlov-manor-mechanics].

Flavor text: "I did it! Double — no, triple homicide! In a building I set on fire. Yep, all me." — Speaker unnamed (the Braggart themselves, implied) [Scryfall]. The escalating confession — doubling from double to triple homicide mid-sentence — is a perfect comedic beat for a creature type called Braggart: claiming credit for crimes as social currency.

Artist Leonardo Santanna. EDHREC rank 25895 — low Commander uptake, consistent with a 5-mana common facing stiff competition at that cost [Scryfall]. Previewed via the official Wizards card gallery on 2024-01-23 [Scryfall preview data].
